onboarding.welcome:
👋 Welcome to Tax Residency Tracker

Track how many days you spend in each country and avoid accidentally triggering tax residency thresholds.

Features:
• Calendar-year tracking
• Rolling 365-day tracking
• Residency alerts
• CSV/XLSX export
• Privacy-first
• No signup required
• Open source

This bot estimates physical presence only and does not provide legal or tax advice.

Please choose your language:
onboarding.complete:
✅ Setup complete.

How to use the bot:

Enter a country:
`/in Indonesia today`

Leave a country:
`/out Indonesia 30.08.26`

Examples:
`/in Thailand 15.01.26`
`/out Thailand today`

Reports:
`/report`
`/report 2026`
`/report Indonesia`
`/report rolling`

The bot automatically:
• tracks calendar-year stays
• tracks rolling 365-day stays
• calculates remaining days before 183-day threshold
• warns you before thresholds are reached

You can change language or date format anytime in /settings

Start by entering the country you're currently in.

start.welcome_back:
Welcome back, {name}!

You're all set. Log a stay with `/in Country date` or open `/report` for a summary.

in.country_not_recognized:
❌ Country not recognized.

Please enter a valid country name.

Example:
`/in Thailand today`
in.invalid_usage:
Usage: `/in Country date`

Example: `/in Thailand today`

out.invalid_usage:
Usage: `/out Country date`

Example: `/out Thailand today`
out.no_open_stay: No open stay found for {country}. Use `/in` first.
out.exit_before_entry: ❌ Exit date cannot be before entry date.

transition.cancelled: Transition cancelled. Your previous stay is unchanged.
transition.expired: This action is no longer valid. Please send /in again.
transition.already_closed: That stay is already closed. Please send /in again.
transition.invalid_dates: Invalid dates for this transition. Please send /in again.

stay.removed:
🗑 Stay removed.

You can now add corrected dates.
stay.remove_not_found: Stay not found or already removed.
